title: xanthium strumarium var. glabratum
intro: Xanthium strumarium var. glabratum, also known as prickly cocklebur, is a variety of the Xanthium strumarium plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Xanthium strumarium var. glabratum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate muscle spasms, and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Xanthium strumarium var. glabratum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
